description.p: Beings made of cursed energy within a shell, somehow gaining sentience.

Ability Score Increase.You increase one ability score of your choice by 4, as you are purpose built for a single purpose.
Age.Your lifespan is hypothetically infinite if you repair yourself.
Alignment.Cursed Corpses are almost always neutral people, not caring about what happens to others around them and usually wanting to exist peacefully.
Size.Your size can be small to large.
Speed.Your base walking speed is 35 feet.
Unnatural.As a construct, you don’t need to breathe, drink, eat, or sleep. However you need materials to mend yourself during a rest.
Languages.You can speak, read, and write Common.
Subrace.There are multiple forms of corpses. The soft bodies range from plush like, to normal living materials like flesh. Hard Shell is the hard skinned stone, wood, or metal.
As a construct, you don’t need to breathe, drink, eat, or sleep. However you need materials to mend yourself during a rest.

sheet.description: You don’t need to breathe, drink, eat, or sleep. However you need materials to mend yourself during a rest.

description.p: You are part of a family of sorcerers or have been involved from a young age, you gain the following:

Ability Score Increase.One ability score of your choice increases by 2 and another by 1.
Proficiencies.You gain proficiency in martial weapons.
Trained Cursed Energy.You gain a Cursed Energy feat.

Very rarely, some humans may be astonishingly stronger than most others in the world, sometimes vastly stronger than the average human. If your human character happens to fall under this category, you can choose to replace the standard Human Ability Score Increase with these traits instead:

Ability Score Increase.You increase either your Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution score by 2 and the others by 1.
Natural Athlete.You have proficiency in the Athletics skill, if you already have proficiency, you instead gain Expertise.
Record Breaker.Your jumping distance is doubled.
Uncanny Endurance.You can focus on occasionally shrugging off injury. When you take damage, you can use your reaction to roll a d12. Add your Constitution modifier to the number rolled, and reduce the damage by that total. After you use this trait, you can’t use it again until you finish a short or long rest.
Powerful Build.You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.
Speed.Your movement speed is 35 feet.

When you take damage, you can use your reaction to roll a d12 and add your Constitution modifier, reducing the damage by that total. Once you use this trait, you can’t use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

sheet.description: When you take damage roll a d12 and add {{constitution:modifier}}, reducing the damage by that total
